name: Revolution Private Credit Income Trust
analysis: REV has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$1.9771. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
